variants.title: A105C10
variants.option1Value: FilterFinder FF203156B Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A105C10
variants.description: The FF203156B is our FilterFinder Approved replacement to the Filtrec A105C10. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of the original Filtrec filter, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our cellulose media and a durable design, the FF203156B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 60.0 mm, Thread: 3/4" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 12 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile
